name: mcp-ispkeeper
description: Read-only MCP server for ISPKeeper. Query clients, invoices, collections, internet connections, tickets, network status, FTTx infrastructure, and more.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: ISPKeeper API key for authentication (x-api-key header)

base_url.title: Base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your ISPKeeper instance (e.g., https://api.anatod.ar)
